name: Asana Project Management
description: Tasks, projects, sections, comments, teams, custom fields via Asana's official MCP

env_vars.description: Asana Personal Access Token or OAuth2 access token
env_vars.how_to_set: app.asana.com → My Settings → Apps → Developer apps → Personal access tokens → Create new token

tools.name: search_tasks
tools.description: Search for tasks across all accessible workspaces and projects using keywords, assignee, completion status, or custom field filters

query.description: Free-text search query to match against task names and descriptions

assignee.description: User GID or 'me' to filter by task assignee

completed.description: Filter by completion status (true = completed, false = incomplete)

tools.name: create_task
tools.description: Create a new task in a specified project with name, description, assignee, due date, and custom fields

projects.description: Array of project GIDs to add the task to

assignee.description: User GID or email to assign the task to

tools.name: get_task
tools.description: Retrieve a task by GID with all details including custom fields, subtasks, attachments, and comments

task_gid.description: The globally unique identifier of the task

tools.name: list_projects
tools.description: List all projects in a workspace or team with name, status, owner, and member details

workspace.description: Workspace GID to list projects from

team.description: Team GID to filter projects by team

tools.name: update_task
tools.description: Update an existing task's name, description, assignee, due date, completion status, or custom fields

task_gid.description: The globally unique identifier of the task to update

assignee.description: User GID or email to reassign the task to

due_on.description: New due date in YYYY-MM-DD format
